title: Slavic Fantasy Font
description: Font that can be applied to fantasy modpack
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c68c459bed7d41ce4603070ff7882df84fe0d176.jpeg)
This resourcepack modifies font to look it like minecraft-styled slavic font, it can be a great addition to medieval or fantasy themed modpack.

Anydoby can use it in any modpacks, but this project must be visibly credited in the modpack's description page.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d3d02dc1581ad3671fb25eb2cbc75b4d8e00003.png)
